metadata.recent_signal: $3M Jan 2026; 50+ BFSI clients incl. Bank of Baroda Cards, Aditya Birla Capital;  4x revenue growth in 6 months
metadata.match_reason: Proprietary  architecture routes parts of a call across STT + multiple LLMs + TTS in real time  = direct multi-model orchestration
metadata.cold_outreach_angle: 'Just-raised seed + ultra-low-latency voice AI for BFSI = exactly your multi-model orchestration stack. Public claim of per-turn model routing = same pattern I ran for 50K+ q/mo. Vengad is ex-AWS, will get the FastAPI+Lambda angle.'
